---
title: "product_filtfilt"
generated: true
description: "Zero-phase forward-backward frequency-domain filter."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.signal.fourier`](../nitrix-signal-fourier.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:product_filtfilt -->
```python
product_filtfilt(X: Num[Array, '... obs'], weight: Num[Array, '... obs_freq'], **fft_params) -> Num[Array, '... obs']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:product_filtfilt -->
Zero-phase forward-backward frequency-domain filter.

Filter forward, reverse the signal, filter again, then reverse
back.  The net effect is zero phase delay even when `weight`
is complex; the amplitude response is the square of the filter
weight's amplitude response.  For real `weight`,
[`product_filter`](../nitrix-signal-fourier/product_filter.qmd) already has zero phase.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:product_filtfilt -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` × `obs` | — | Multi-channel signal; the trailing axis indexes observations. |
| `weight` | `Num` | `...` × `obs_freq` | — | Frequency-domain weights; the trailing axis is the rfft frequency axis (length `obs // 2 + 1`). |
| `**fft_params` | `Any` | — | `{}` | — |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `obs`. Zero-phase filtered signal, same shape as `X`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:product_filtfilt -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `obs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `obs_freq` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
